economic_notes: Five business entities accounted for using modified equity method: Halfway River Ventures Ltd. (right of way clearing/utility services), Halfway River Resources Ltd., Halfway River Holdings Ltd., Halfway River Limited Partnership (economic/business opportunities), and Six Nations Ventures Limited Partnership 16.67% interest (log sort yard, contract hauling and janitorial services in Fort St. John area). Gas station under construction, access road under construction.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-disclosure of budget information as required by PSAS (Note 14). Five entities accounted for by modified equity method (not fully consolidated). Promissory notes payable of $3,323,685 to Government of Canada related to specific Treaty 8 claim negotiations - non-interest bearing, due March 31, 2021 or upon settlement. Potential impairment of sewer upgrade assets noted but not quantified. Contingent decommissioning liability for gas station under construction not quantified. Accumulated surplus includes large unrestricted operating deficit of $12,714,664. OSR calculation excludes ISC, FNHA, BC provincial, and CMHC transfers. Remuneration schedule referenced but not included in extracted text.
